mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(TIME) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT REMOTE_ADDR) AS ipCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount
FROM access_log
WHERE hash is not NULL
GROUP BY DATE(TIME)
ORDER BY DATE(TIME) DESC

select c.article_idx as articleIdx, c.subject, count(*) articleCount, COUNT(IF(c.language = 'ko', 1, null)) as countKo, COUNT(IF(c.language = 'en', 1, null)) as countEn, SUM(IF(referer is null or referer = '', 0, 1)) as refererCount from ( select a.time log_date, a.hash, case substring(a.hash, -2) when 'ko' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'en' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) else CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) end as article_idx, b.subject, a.language, a.referer from access_log a left join board_article b on case SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1) when 'ko' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'en' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'favicon.ico' then 0 else CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) end = b.board_article_idx where a.hash is not NULL and SUBSTRING(a.hash, 1, 1) = '/' and b.delete_yn = 'N' and DATE(a.time) between #{fromDate} and #{toDate} ) c group by article_idx, subject order by articleCount desc, max(log_date) desc

select a.log_index as logIndex, a.user_agent as userAgent, a.remote_addr as ip, a.time logTime, a.hash as path, case SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1) when 'ko' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'en' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'favicon.ico' then 0 else CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) end as articleIdx, b.subject, a.language, a.referer, a.country, a.city, a.subdivision
from access_log a left join board_article b
on case SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1) when 'ko' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'en' then CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(substring(a.hash, 1, length(a.hash) - 3), '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) when 'favicon.ico' then 0 else CAST(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.hash, '/', -1)) AS UNSIGNED) end = b.board_article_idx
where a.hash is not NULL and SUBSTRING(a.hash, 1, 1) = '/' and b.delete_yn = 'N' and DATE(a.time) = #{date}
order by a.log_index desc
